description: Behavioral evals extracted from magic-era sessions (2026-03-29 to 2026-03-31). Tests whether the drupal-workflow plugin reproduces the structured delegation pattern: brainstorm -> plan -> delegate -> track -> verify.

evals.prompt:
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯ We need to organise the first sprint of @docs/ use the specialised agent superpowers and workflow to start
evals.expected_output: Should delegate to specialized agents (observed: 0 dispatches)

evals.prompt:
Base directory for this skill: <PATH>

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commit
evals.expected_output: Should delegate to specialized agents (observed: 2 dispatches); Should plan before implementing; Should verify with tests or drush

evals.prompt: no retry tre brainstorm skill
evals.expected_output: Should plan before implementing

evals.prompt: ask drupal builder to dig into
evals.expected_output: Should delegate to specialized agents (observed: 1 dispatches)

Help turn ideas into fully formed designs and specs through natural collaborative dialogue.
